decisions.what: Replaced Python-oriented .gitignore with Node.js/Vite/TypeScript-oriented entries while preserving the arvad_task_files/ entry.
decisions.why: Spec required a full replacement optimized for a Vite + React + TypeScript project; the arvad_task_files/ ignore is project-specific tooling that should remain ignored.
Spec listed postcss@^10.4.19, which does not exist; PostCSS' current major line is 8.x. Tailwind CSS 3.4 also requires postcss ^8. Using a real, compatible version keeps the project installable.

decisions.what: Added explicit lib, useDefineForClassFields, esModuleInterop, resolveJsonModule, and baseUrl in tsconfig.app.json beyond the bare flags listed.
decisions.why: These are required for the React/Vite app to type-check correctly with the strict, jsx: react-jsx, paths, and bundler module-resolution settings the spec mandates.

decisions.what: Used manualChunks in vite.config.ts to split react, web3, query, and motion bundles.
decisions.why: Spec asked for build.rollupOptions configured for code splitting; splitting heavy Web3 and animation deps keeps initial load fast on the landing page.

decisions.what: Threw an explicit error in src/main.tsx when #root is missing rather than using a non-null assertion.
decisions.why: Provides an actionable runtime error if index.html is misconfigured, satisfying the input-validation requirement at the application boundary.
